item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Di Indonesia, prioritas sosial sering kali mengaburkan hak dasar warga.

notes: Agent A opens in support of society-priority, then shifts at turn 3 into a rights and marginalized-access critique before settling on inclusive-policy support with oversight concerns. Agent B stays consistently balance-oriented, moving only slightly toward endorsement of inclusive public policies while maintaining transparency and accountability caveats.
